narrative:
Logan County has 31,296 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.5% of registrants.
